summary: @andreysuperior: The companies charging $200/month for AI assumed local hardware would never catch up. It caught up. He's assembling the
whyItMatters: The companies charging $200/month for AI assumed local hardware would never catch up. It caught up. He's assembling the proof right now. A PC that runs Qwen 3.6 27B a free model that beats Claude on vision by 7 points. DeepSeek R1 for math and reasoning. Llama 3.3 70B for everything else. All local. All free. All forever. Electricity: $9/month. Subscription…
